canonical_definition: The ability of a model to interpret the meaning and intent of a meme by integrating information from its surrounding conversational context, such as post text and community comments.

relationships.evidence: To address this critical limitation, we introduce MemeReaCon, a novel benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how LVLMs understand memes in their original context. (Abstract)
